## Entities.Confections.ConfectionsLibrary.createAsync() method

Creates a new ConfectionsLibrary instance asynchronously with encryption support.

Use this factory method when you need to decrypt encrypted collections. Pass encryption config via `params.encryption`<!-- -->.

**Signature:**

```typescript
static createAsync(params?: IConfectionsLibraryAsyncParams): Promise<Result<ConfectionsLibrary>>;
```
